meta.dataset: Building Data Genome Project 2 (open, peer-reviewed; Nature Scientific Data)
meta.model: LightGBM (gradient-boosted trees; same model family as ASHRAE GEPIII winners)
meta.split: Train: 2016 · Test: 2017 (valid hours only; site-wide metering outages excluded)
meta.note: All predictions, bands, metrics and KPIs are real model outputs on real BDG2 data. Metric = CV-RMSE (not MAPE).
